name: Minecraft Skin Studio
description: Draft, clean, preview, register, or build a Minecraft Java skin workflow, including the bundled Minecraft Skin Bar app.
short_description: Build launcher-ready skins or the bundled menu bar app.
audience: Minecraft players creating or importing Java skin PNGs
Mac users who want local preview and launcher registration handoff
Builders maintaining the bundled Minecraft Skin Bar app and helper scripts
detail_lines: Keeps the launcher-ready deliverable explicit: a 64x64 skin PNG, preview image, and optional local launcher registration entry.
Supports generate, import, clean, render-preview, and register lanes without pretending to change Mojang account state silently.
Preserves the bundled app's local-first boundary, including Keychain or environment-only API key handling.
